title: Bribeable
description: Defines the way an entity can get into the 'bribed' state.

bribe_items.title: Bribe Items
bribe_items.description:
The list of items that can be used to bribe the entity. Can be an array or a single item string.

Sample values:
• dolphin: ["fish","salmon"]

bribe_cooldown.title: Bribe Cooldown
bribe_cooldown.description: Time in seconds before the Entity can be bribed again.
